notes: Canonical testnet deployment (planned per PLAN.md). Deployed via `smartpolicy-mcp deploy` from embedded bytecode; both contracts source-verified on Blockscout (base-sepolia.blockscout.com). Genesis policy #1: metadataURI ipfs://smartpolicy-genesis-v2 with on-chain metadataHash (keccak256 of the URI). Deployer is a fresh testnet-only key generated 2026-07-05 (funded via Google faucet on Ethereum Sepolia, bridged through the official L1StandardBridge 0xfd0Bf71F60660E2f608ed56e1659C450eB113120); key stored locally outside the repo. Deployer = protocol owner = fee collector. Fresh keys for any mainnet deploy.
